The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] '''X-31 landspeeder''' was the predecessor of the [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|X-34 landspeeder]]. First produced prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was still used after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], SoroSuub provided these vehicles to [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] governments, meant to be supplied to municipal employees, maintenance workers and donated to farmers, pioneers and other citizens for support.
